title: Vanilla+ (Server)
description: A server-side vanilla+ mod meant to enhance vanilla worlds
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61c3e3f1f45c473666f153e2aa5236e21995b2c2.png)

The Vanilla+ Server Side pack is a modpack meant to add small features to the server side host, while still retaining the vanilla feel. Any server utilizing this pack is able to be joined by a bare vanilla client with no issues or incompatibilities. The only mods present are there to increase optimization or modify small features of the game, i.e. terrain generation.]

This pack is best paired with it's [client side counterpart](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla+client) which will further enhance the vanilla experience.

If you want a more modded experience with the same vanilla feel, check out my [Vanilla++ pack](https://modrinth.com/project/spicyee-vanilla++)

-----

This pack does not include any resource packs or shaders, as it is only for the server side.
